allow: PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs;$env:Path"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|✓ built" | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($env:Path = "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs;$env:Path"; npm run build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "error|✓ built" | Select-Object -First 20; Write-Output "=== base check ==="; Select-String -Path dist/index.html -Pattern 'src=|href=' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Trim\(\) })
